generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = http://example.org/dtdf
namespace base = http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
instance LiDARPointCloudSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for autonomous vehicle"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ObjectTrackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor detecting and tracking objects in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor generating projected driving path based on vehicle dynamics and environmental data"
]

instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackSensor
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ProjectedDrivingPathSensor
]

instance RawLiDARDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data in real-time",
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARData
]

instance VehicleStateDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTrackDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPathData
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software component for processing raw LiDAR point clouds into object clusters and tracks"
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion per ISO 23247"
]

instance DataPreprocessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for preprocessing raw sensor data including clustering and translation",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler handling offloading of ACC computations to Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote operator control via UI",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, GenerateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC system computations including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands from resource-constrained ECUs",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and send emergency braking commands via UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of the projected driving path for ACC system"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks in the environment"
]

instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Ability to save and generate reports from vehicle data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC using offloaded computation"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of optimal speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actuation commands for throttle, brake, and steering",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to enable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to disable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to set desired speed for ACC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages hardware resources and general automotive functionality including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking",
    base:contains LiDARPointCloudSensor, VehicleStateSensor, ObjectTrackSensor, ProjectedDrivingPathSensor, PointCloudClusteringTracking, ISO23247DataTranslationFE, DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data management and control mechanisms for the Digital Twin",
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Includes split subcomponents for 3D Visualization and Control Panel",
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for real-time 3D visualization of vehicle data"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component for remote control commands (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking)"
]

instance ACCSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system environment with separate hardware for Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User entities",
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), including motor actuation and steering servo commands, are generated by the ACC Controlling FE component. These commands undergo serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion via the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE component before being transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, driven by hardware limitations in safety-critical vehicular applications where industry standards typically require stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture adheres to ISO 23247 RA with ROS2-based implementation where each Functional Entity (FE) is encapsulated in individual ROS2 packages containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The system is structured into three hardware-deployed entities: Physical Twin Entity (handling resource-specific functions and device communication), Digital Twin Entity (managing data processing and control), and User Entity (split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel). Notable deviations include the Physical Twin Entity's role in hosting general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, which diverges from the standard's OME focus on resource-specific tasks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the provided documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2021 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is facilitated through protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control functionalities."
]
